text: I am pleased to announce that Kevin McAleenan, the very talented former Acting Secretary of Homeland Security, has been named the Acting White House Chief of Staff. I have confidence Kevin will do a great job!
House Democrats just killed a great deal for DACA recipients, the Border, and paid for by Mexico. They were not even able to pass their own government funding bill last night, 6 to 228. So sad!
We have the most BEAUTIFUL Christmas Tree at the @WhiteHouse! Merry Christmas!!! ❤️

Today, I was briefed on a terrible situation facing our Country — the Coronavirus — and more importantly, what we are doing about it. I will be on @FoxNews tonight at 9:00 P.M. (Eastern) to discuss this very important subject.
THANK YOU FLORIDA! We won in a LANDSLIDE! Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! The Silent Majority is back, and we are just getting started!
